restSimpleBinding.body: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Header/> <soap:Body> <ns:UpdateFlight xmlns:ns="http://www.outsystems.com"> <ns:Flight> <ns:FlightId>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/FlightId/text()}</ns:FlightId> <ns:FlightCode> <ns:FlightCode>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/FlightCode/FlightCode/text()}</ns:FlightCode> <ns:PublicFlightCode>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/FlightCode/PublicFlightCode/text()}</ns:PublicFlightCode> <ns:AirlineCodeIATA>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/FlightCode/AirlineCodeIATA/text()}</ns:AirlineCodeIATA> <ns:AirlineCodeICAO>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/FlightCode/AirlineCodeICAO/text()}</ns:AirlineCodeICAO> </ns:FlightCode> <ns:MovType>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/MovType/text()}</ns:MovType> <ns:ScheduleDateTimeUTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/ScheduleDateTimeUTC/text()}</ns:ScheduleDateTimeUTC> <ns:Airport> <ns:ICAO>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/Airport/ICAO/text()}</ns:ICAO> <ns:IATA>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/Airport/IATA/text()}</ns:IATA> </ns:Airport> <ns:FlightType>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/FlightType/text()}</ns:FlightType> <ns:CallSign>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/CallSign/text()}</ns:CallSign> <ns:AircraftModel> <ns:ICAO>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/AircraftModel/ICAO/text()}</ns:ICAO> <ns:IATA>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/AircraftModel/IATA/text()}</ns:IATA> <ns:IATASubType>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/AircraftModel/IATASubType/text()}</ns:IATASubType> </ns:AircraftModel> <ns:AircraftRegistration>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/AircraftRegistration/text()}</ns:AircraftRegistration> <ns:AircraftCapacity>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/AircraftCapacity/text()}</ns:AircraftCapacity> <ns:OrigDestAirport> <ns:ICAO>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/OrigDestAirport/ICAO/text()}</ns:ICAO> <ns:IATA>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/OrigDestAirport/IATA/text()}</ns:IATA> </ns:OrigDestAirport> <ns:ClassificationCode>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/ClassificationCode/text()}</ns:ClassificationCode> <ns:ServiceTypeCode>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/ServiceTypeCode/text()}</ns:ServiceTypeCode> <ns:NatureCode>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/NatureCode/text()}</ns:NatureCode> <ns:OperationCode>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/OperationCode/text()}</ns:OperationCode> <ns:Runway>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/Runway/text()}</ns:Runway> <ns:FlightStopList> { for $str_Airport in $UpdateFlight/Flight/FlightStopList/str_Airport return <ns:str_Airport> <ns:ICAO>{$str_Airport/ICAO/text()}</ns:ICAO> <ns:IATA>{$str_Airport/IATA/text()}</ns:IATA> </ns:str_Airport> } </ns:FlightStopList> <ns:CodeShareList> { for $str_FlightCode in $UpdateFlight/Flight/CodeShareList/str_FlightCode return <ns:str_FlightCode> <ns:FlightCode>{$str_FlightCode/FlightCode/text()}</ns:FlightCode> <ns:PublicFlightCode>{$str_FlightCode/PublicFlightCode/text()}</ns:PublicFlightCode> <ns:AirlineCodeIATA>{$str_FlightCode/AirlineCodeIATA/text()}</ns:AirlineCodeIATA> <ns:AirlineCodeICAO>{$str_FlightCode/AirlineCodeICAO/text()}</ns:AirlineCodeICAO> </ns:str_FlightCode> } </ns:CodeShareList> <ns:DelayCodeList> { for $str_Delay in $UpdateFlight/Flight/DelayCodeList/str_Delay return <ns:str_Delay> <ns:Code>{$str_Delay/Code/text()}</ns:Code> </ns:str_Delay> } </ns:DelayCodeList> <ns:BeltList> { for $str_Resource in $UpdateFlight/Flight/BeltList/str_Resource return <ns:str_Resource> <ns:Code>{$str_Resource/Code/text()}</ns:Code> <ns:TerminalCode>{$str_Resource/TerminalCode/text()}</ns:TerminalCode> </ns:str_Resource> } </ns:BeltList> <ns:CheckInList> { for $str_Resource in $UpdateFlight/Flight/CheckInList/str_Resource return <ns:str_Resource> <ns:Code>{$str_Resource/Code/text()}</ns:Code> <ns:TerminalCode>{$str_Resource/TerminalCode/text()}</ns:TerminalCode> </ns:str_Resource> } </ns:CheckInList> <ns:ChuteList> { for $str_Resource in $UpdateFlight/Flight/ChuteList/str_Resource return <ns:str_Resource> <ns:Code>{$str_Resource/Code/text()}</ns:Code> <ns:TerminalCode>{$str_Resource/TerminalCode/text()}</ns:TerminalCode> </ns:str_Resource> } </ns:ChuteList> <ns:GateList> { for $str_Gate in $UpdateFlight/Flight/GateList/str_Gate return <ns:str_Gate> <ns:Code>{$str_Gate/Code/text()}</ns:Code> <ns:TerminalCode>{$str_Gate/TerminalCode/text()}</ns:TerminalCode> <ns:FlightGateStatus>{$str_Gate/FlightGateStatus/text()}</ns:FlightGateStatus> <ns:StartDateTimeUTC>{$str_Gate/StartDateTimeUTC/text()}</ns:StartDateTimeUTC> <ns:EndDateTimeUTC>{$str_Gate/EndDateTimeUTC/text()}</ns:EndDateTimeUTC> </ns:str_Gate> } </ns:GateList> <ns:StandList> { for $str_Resource in $UpdateFlight/Flight/StandList/str_Resource return <ns:str_Resource> <ns:Code>{$str_Resource/Code/text()}</ns:Code> <ns:TerminalCode>{$str_Resource/TerminalCode/text()}</ns:TerminalCode> </ns:str_Resource> } </ns:StandList> <ns:LastDateTimeUTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/LastDateTimeUTC/text()}</ns:LastDateTimeUTC> <ns:EstimatedDateTimeUTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/EstimatedDateTimeUTC/text()}</ns:EstimatedDateTimeUTC> <ns:PublicEstimatedDateTimeUTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/PublicEstimatedDateTimeUTC/text()}</ns:PublicEstimatedDateTimeUTC> <ns:BlockDateTimeUTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/BlockDateTimeUTC/text()}</ns:BlockDateTimeUTC> <ns:ActualDateTimeUTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/ActualDateTimeUTC/text()}</ns:ActualDateTimeUTC> <ns:HandlersList> { for $str_Handler in $UpdateFlight/Flight/HandlersList/str_Handler return <ns:str_Handler> <ns:AssistanceTypeCode>{$str_Handler/AssistanceTypeCode/text()}</ns:AssistanceTypeCode> <ns:HandlerCode>{$str_Handler/HandlerCode/text()}</ns:HandlerCode> <ns:ServiceCode>{$str_Handler/ServiceCode/text()}</ns:ServiceCode> </ns:str_Handler> } </ns:HandlersList> <ns:Observations>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/Observations/text()}</ns:Observations> <ns:RotationKey>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/RotationKey/text()}</ns:RotationKey> <ns:OSTD_UTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/OSTD_UTC/text()}</ns:OSTD_UTC> <ns:DSTA_UTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/DSTA_UTC/text()}</ns:DSTA_UTC> <ns:RemarksCode>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/RemarksCode/text()}</ns:RemarksCode> <ns:RemarksValue>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/RemarksValue/text()}</ns:RemarksValue> <ns:TTOT_UTC>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/TTOT_UTC/text()}</ns:TTOT_UTC> <ns:InfrastructureRemarkCode>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/InfrastructureRemarkCode/text()}</ns:InfrastructureRemarkCode> <ns:InfrastructureRemarkValue>{$UpdateFlight/Flight/InfrastructureRemarkValue/text()}</ns:InfrastructureRemarkValue> </ns:Flight> </ns:UpdateFlight> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>
